gist.headline: Fresh coat of paint
gist.blurb: We finally stopped scattering colors everywhere and built a proper design system for the dashboard. Everything from API keys to model selection is now delightfully consistent.
gist.summary: The enter.pollinations.ai dashboard has been refactored to use a single, unified design system with shared UI primitives and a streamlined CSS architecture.
gist.impact: Navigating your API keys, models, and billing is now a visually consistent and much cleaner experience.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a painter's beret, organizing UI elements (buttons, switches, tabs) on a retro computer screen alongside the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, organizing glowing UI buttons and switches alongside a cute chunky monitor robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text on the robot's screen in pixel font: 'CLEAN'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
